summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Arbeidsflyt-kontroll app. Backend: 15/15 tests pass. Frontend: All core flows working - dashboard loads with seeded jobs, session execution with Ja/Nei buttons and conditional subtasks, Ferdig button correctly enabled at 100%, admin panel CRUD, JSON config export/import.

issues: job-description-input testID is 'job-description-input' but was searched as 'job-desc-input' - minor naming inconsistency

react_native_issues.issue: Console warns: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Non-critical but should be updated.
Console warns: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Non-critical.

action_items: Fix deprecated 'shadow*' style props -> use 'boxShadow' (StyleSheet.create) to remove console warnings
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: import_config endpoint accepts raw dict without Pydantic validation - potential for injection
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') - should use lifespan context manager in FastAPI
PDF generation uses expo-print which is web-only on Expo Web - Ferdig button works but PDF share dialog may not work in web preview (platform limitation, not a bug)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all major flows working, minor deprecated prop warnings

seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 2 jobs (Kabelpåvisning, Inspeksjon av rørledning) on first load via /api/seed
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is working well. Dashboard shows seeded jobs, session execution with Ja/Nei conditional subtasks works correctly, Ferdig button disabled until all tasks answered, admin CRUD and JSON config export/import all functional. Minor deprecated RN prop warnings in console.
